title: Allow compiled binaries to be extra quiet
body:
I use Verilator to run firmware test. This works great, except the output always contains "Verilog $finish":
```
running 1 test
- rtl/testbench.sv:126: Verilog $finish
test test_name ... ok
```
I use `+verilator+quiet`, but this line is still there. By any chance we could have a way to make it extra quiet to avoid printing even things like $finish?
code_blocks:
running 1 test
- rtl/testbench.sv:126: Verilog $finish
test test_name ... ok
